meaning: adj.点头的,低垂的,昏昏欲睡的
examples: He sat nodding in front of the fire.
The judge kept nodding in agreement.
I have only a bowing [nodding] acquaintance with him.
The trees still grow this way, nodding their lush heads at us as we walked along the track.
Nodding off after dinner or wanting to sleep till noon could indicate circadian rhythm disorders.
